footer.description: The app for finding, organizing, and sharing your memories in a clear, modern, and collaborative interface.

sharedSpace.title: Your Shared Space
sharedSpace.description: Keep your important moments close, organize your content, and access your memories from a single app that feels clear, calm, and fast.

feed.title: Your Feed
feed.description: Post your photos, videos, and updates in a space that stays easy to browse so you can stay connected without friction.

privateChats.title: Your Private Conversations
privateChats.description: Chat easily with friends or family, react to moments, share media, and keep the connection alive in a more personal space.

captureMoment.title: Capture the Moment
captureMoment.description: Share instantly with your friends, send your best shots, and keep a stream of memories alive every day.

memories.title: Your Memories
memories.description: Bring everything you want to keep into one place, find your favorite content quickly, and let your shared albums grow over time.

camille.name: Camille M.
camille.quote: Shared helps me find my friends' photos and videos quickly without digging everywhere. The app feels clean and genuinely pleasant to use.

lucas.name: Lucas G.
lucas.quote: I like how simple and direct it feels. I share a moment, everyone finds it right away, and the experience stays fluid every day.

sarah.name: Sarah E.
sarah.quote: We use it to keep a trace of our weekends with friends. Everything is well presented and I can always find the content that matters.

nicolas.name: Nicolas R.
nicolas.quote: I needed a simpler space to share memories and talk around my images. Shared does that job really well.

julie.name: Julie C.
julie.quote: The interface focuses on what matters, and that is exactly what I was looking for. I can post, browse, and share without getting lost.

antoine.name: Antoine V.
antoine.quote: The app makes me want to come back to it. Everything feels more personal, easier to read, and the shared moments carry more meaning.

lea.name: Léa R.
lea.quote: I love being able to keep my creative memories and the ones from people close to me in one place. It feels simple, clean, and reassuring.

thomas.name: Thomas D.
thomas.quote: I mostly use Shared after parties and trips. We find everything fast and the conversations stay attached to the right moments.

ines.name: Inès P.
ines.quote: The app feels intuitive from the very first launch. I really like the way the content is highlighted.

mathieu.name: Mathieu R.
mathieu.quote: I use Shared to keep a more personal space with the people close to me. The product feels polished, fast, and enjoyable to browse.

contact.intro: Do you have a question, feedback, a bug report, or an improvement request? Feel free to get in touch.

status.success: Thanks, your message was sent successfully.
status.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
status.networkError: Unable to send your message right now.
